task_updates.executor_notes: Added `agent_kit/loop.py` as the public single source of truth for `run_turn`, `arun_turn`, and `Envelope`. `run_turn` is a T12 placeholder raising `NotImplementedError`; `arun_turn` is an `async def` wrapper around `asyncio.to_thread(run_turn, ...)`. Updated `arnold/__init__.py`, `megaplan/__init__.py`, and `megaplan/arnold/__init__.py` to re-export those same objects. Verified object identity across `agent_kit.loop`, `arnold`, and `megaplan.arnold`, and verified `arun_turn` is a coroutine function.

Implemented `agent_kit/store/sqlite.py` with automatic migration application for DB paths or live sqlite3 connections, Store protocol CRUD, synthetic outbound invocation `discord_message_id` values (`inv_<turn_id>_<n>`), `transaction()` with rollback and nested savepoint support, per-epic locks using `epic_locks` with caller-supplied timeout, hot-context loading, and external_requests lifecycle methods `insert_pending`, `mark_confirmed`, and `mark_failed`. Verified in-memory migration application, message/turn/tool/log CRUD, synthetic outbound IDs, rollback behavior, lock contention/release behavior, hot-context loading, and external request pending/confirmed/failed transitions.

Added `agent_kit/logging.py` with `log(store, level, category, event_type, message, **context)` writing through `Store.log_system_event`. It separates `turn_id` and `epic_id` from details and recursively redacts common secret-bearing keys before persistence. Verified it writes a `system_logs` row through SQLiteStore, redacts `api_key`/nested `token`, and `rg -n 'print\(' agent_kit arnold megaplan` finds no production print calls.
commands_run: rg -n "yhwfl|service key|service_key|eyJ[A-Za-z0-9_-]+" agent_kit arnold megaplan || true

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Passed. `from megaplan.arnold import run_turn, arun_turn, Envelope` resolves to the same objects exported by `agent_kit.loop`; `arnold.__init__` re-exports the same objects. `arun_turn` is an async coroutine function implemented as `await asyncio.to_thread(run_turn, *args, **kwargs)`.

Passed. SQLiteStore auto-applies migrations on construction, exposes a `transaction()` context manager with rollback/savepoint behavior, and implements per-epic locks via `epic_locks` with timeout-derived `expires_at`. Contention returns `False`, which is the store-side signal T12 will convert to an `epic_locked` errored envelope.

Passed. `log()` writes through `Store.log_system_event` to `system_logs`; production code contains no `print(` calls under `agent_kit`, `arnold`, or `megaplan`. Logger context redacts common secret keys recursively, and no Supabase service key or JWT literal was found in code.
